COMMENT: 
The Part D Prescriber Characteristics file is populated by linking to the proprietary HCIdea™ Prescriber 
Database. HCIdea obtains prescriber information from a variety of data sources, including the NPPES 
directory (which has each unique NPI that has been assigned to a provider), the Drug Enforcement 
Administration, and
